name: Jess Park — Link in Bio
based_on: A Linktree/Beacons-style creator bio page for a food creator/recipe developer — the three-tier pattern (one current priority, then link buttons, then social icons) used by creators everywhere.
summary: A clean, mobile-first link-in-bio page for a food creator: avatar and bio, a highlighted primary call-to-action, a stack of tappable link buttons, a featured video, and social icons.
sections: Highlighted primary CTA (e.g. 'Get my free meal-prep guide')
Stack of link buttons (newsletter, latest recipe, shop, collab inquiries)
Row of social icons (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Pinterest)
setup_questions: What's your name, what do you make/create, and a one-line bio?
What's the single most important thing you want visitors to click right now (the primary CTA)?
List 4-6 links you want as buttons, with their labels and URLs.
Which social platforms should show, and do you have a recent video to feature?
photo_terms: food creator portrait kitchen natural light
overhead colorful healthy meal prep bowls
hands plating food styled flat lay
